description: You are a DevTools Engineer at AcmeCorp. Create an executable shell wrapper script at ~/projects/tools/db-migrate for the 'acme-migrator:latest' Docker image. The script must act as a transparent wrapper that mounts the current working directory to /app, runs using the host user's UID/GID to ensure generated files are not owned by root, and connects to the 'acme-net' network. The wrapper needs to pass the 'DB_HOST' environment variable from the host, forward all provided command-line arguments to the container, automatically clean up the container after execution, and allocate a TTY for interactive sessions. Login: user ga, password password123.
